overview: PNACADEMY EDTECH's Digital Neural Campus — a dark, cinematic AI-powered academic evaluation platform landing page showcasing the COSE Framework for secure, unbiased examination processing in Bihar's educational institutions.
features: Immersive 3D hero animation with neural network visualization
Glassmorphism UI with neon cyan accents
COSE Framework deep-dive with Easy Word explanations
Founder profile highlighting NIT Rourkela & AWS credentials
3D floating contact form with encrypted submission animation
Backend inquiry storage with timestamped records
